name: pipeline
summary: The gated work chain: pre-frame → frame → scope → design → build → deploy → observe. Walks the stages and stops at each gate awaiting a human approval — recorded (a 'gates' row), never a live block. Event-sourced + resumable: approve a gate, re-run, it continues. Stages never fake a runner; each records its owning (planned) component + a stub status.

admission.note: Candidate. NOT in harness/manifest.json and NOT admitted. Promotion is a human step.

exit: Stops at the first unapproved gate (awaiting-gate) or runs out of stages (complete) — never blocks waiting on a human.
invariants: A gate is recorded ('pending'), never a live block — the human approves asynchronously.
Resumable + event-sourced: the frontier is derived from the chain/gates streams.
No stage fakes a runner — each records its owning (planned) component + a stub status.
